rationale: Wormhole (W) has a 10B fixed max supply with ~3.68B currently circulating (~37% of total) following its April 2024 TGE; large investor, team, and ecosystem tranches continue unlocking linearly over a ~4-year schedule, producing an estimated ~1.2–1.4B new circulating tokens annually (~33–38% inflation on current circulating supply). The rate is declining because each successive year unlocks a smaller share relative to the growing circulating base, and the absolute unlock pace tapers after year 2.
caveats: Precise monthly unlock tranches are NOT fully disclosed in a machine-readable public schedule; the ~35% figure is a best-estimate derived from observed circulating supply growth (CoinGecko history: ~1.8B at TGE Apr-2024 → ~3.68B Jul-2025 ≈ +1.88B in ~15 months) and publicly described vesting categories. Treat as ±5 percentage points. A precise figure would require the full vesting contract data on-chain (Solana/Ethereum) which is NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER without a paid indexer.
